actions.label: delay
actions.name: execute_python

parameters.description: The code to run. Can be a file ID from within Shuffle.
parameters.name: code
parameters.value:
import requests
import time

scan_id = "$SpiderFoot-StartScan.body.#1"
url = f"http://192.168.1.199:5009/scanstatus?id={scan_id}"

for i in range(20):
    r = requests.get(url, headers={"Accept": "application/json"})
    status = r.json()[5]
    if status == "FINISHED":
        return scan_id
    time.sleep(10)

return scan_id
